nasb.text: You shall present these besides the burnt offering of the morning, which is for a continual burnt offering.

esv.text: You shall offer these besides the burnt offering of the morning, which is for a regular burnt offering.

cnv.text: 除了早晨的燔祭，就是常獻的燔祭以外，還要把這些祭物獻上。

ccb.text: 除了早晨献的日常燔祭以外，要献上这些祭物。
